args.message: Alright, alright, you've got me! The truth is, keeping meticulous records for every single one of those minor services like differential fluid changes and spark plugs for every vehicle that comes through here... well, it's a lot. What I can tell you for absolute certain is that this 3.6L Pentastar engine is a workhorse. We haven't had any reports of leaks or any unusual noises whatsoever. It runs incredibly smoothly. Now, sometimes, with these engines, you might get a *very* occasional, slight hesitation – it's super rare, happens maybe once in a blue moon – but it's usually just a quirky little thing. Most owners don't even notice it, and it certainly doesn't affect performance. I'd say it's just part of its rugged charm!
